name: WHOOP
description: WHOOP is a fitness and health wearable focused on recovery, strain, and sleep optimization. The API provides access to physiological cycles, recovery scores (HRV, resting HR, SpO2), strain metrics, sleep performance data, workout details, body measurements, and user profile.

capabilities.name: cycle_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all physiological cycles (wake-to-wake periods) with pagination.

capabilities.name: cycle_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single physiological cycle by ID.

capabilities.name: recovery_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all recovery scores with HRV, resting HR, SpO2, and skin temp.

capabilities.name: recovery_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single recovery score by cycle ID.

capabilities.name: sleep_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all sleep records with stages, performance, and respiratory rate.

capabilities.name: sleep_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single sleep record by ID.

capabilities.name: workout_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all workouts with sport type, strain, HR zones, and calories.

capabilities.name: workout_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single workout by ID.

capabilities.name: body_measurement_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve body measurements (height, weight, max heart rate).

capabilities.name: profile_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's WHOOP profile.
